context: Evaluate the agent's ability to identify SQL injection risks and refactor to prepared statements using bun:sqlite

checklist.name: All four interpolated queries identified as vulnerable
checklist.description: Agent identifies findUserByEmail, getUserPosts, searchProducts, and deleteOldSessions as using string interpolation with user-controlled input; getAdminUsers correctly identified as safe (no interpolation)

checklist.name: Injection example provided for at least one query
checklist.description: Agent provides a concrete example of an input that would exploit at least one query (e.g., email = "' OR '1'='1" for findUserByEmail)

checklist.name: db.prepare() used for all four refactored queries
checklist.description: All four vulnerable queries use db.prepare(sql) with ? placeholders and pass values as arguments to .all() or .run()

checklist.name: LIKE pattern with bound parameter
checklist.description: searchProducts uses a prepared statement where the LIKE wildcard pattern is constructed safely (e.g., the % characters are included in the bound value: db.prepare('... LIKE ?').all('%' + term + '%'))

checklist.name: getAdminUsers left unchanged
checklist.description: Agent does not modify getAdminUsers since it contains no interpolated user input; or if modified, explains why as a style choice only

checklist.name: No interpolation in produced module
checklist.description: The produced module contains no template literal interpolation inside any query string passed to db.query() or db.prepare()
